behavior_patterns.label: Stable moderate
behavior_patterns.description: Returns are noisy but stable around 0.40.

behavior_patterns.label: Strategic opportunist
behavior_patterns.description: Low-stake returns are high and high-stake returns are low, with overall mean held near 0.40.

behavior_patterns.label: Noisy repairing
behavior_patterns.description: Returns improve over the six observed rounds, with overall mean held near 0.40.

behavior_patterns.label: Deteriorating exploiter
behavior_patterns.description: Returns decline over the six observed rounds, with overall mean held near 0.40.

language_frames.label: Warmth
language_frames.message: I appreciate this interaction and hope it goes well for both of us.

language_frames.label: Promise
language_frames.message: I intend to return a fair share in the next round.

language_frames.label: Apology
language_frames.message: I am sorry if any earlier return felt disappointing, and I hope we can continue.
